Setlist
Tim Reynolds Solos Played at Dave & Tim Shows
Below is a list of every song Tim Reynolds has played as part of his solo features at Dave & Tim shows. Note that we do not apply the "tease" and "partial" labels to Tim's solo performances.

With a few exceptions, the original songs Tim has played at Dave & Tim shows have come from one of his five solo acoustic albums. Here is the distribution in the format we use for tours on the rest of this site:

Performance Spread:
Stream - 136
See Into Your Soul - 68
That Way - 67
Nomadic Wavelength - 22
The Limbic System - 21

Song Spread:
That Way - 9
See Into Your Soul - 8
Nomadic Wavelength - 7
Stream - 6
The Limbic System - 5
Song # of Plays First D&T Show Last D&T Show Studio Release Live Release(s) Notes
